filename.description: New articles keep the existing timestamp-style filename format.

fields.name: audio
fields.label: Audio
fields.description: Upload or select an audio file, for example /uploads/sermon.mp3.

filename.description: Each topic is stored as a timestamp-named markdown file inside the English subsection folder.

fields.name: subsection
fields.label: Subsection
fields.description: Visible subsection name. You can enter Tamil here, for example: தேவனியல்.

fields.name: subsectionFolder
fields.label: Subsection Folder
fields.description: English folder name for a new subsection, for example: theology-proper, christology, salvation. Leave this empty when creating inside an existing subsection folder.

fields.name: order
fields.label: Order
fields.description: Smaller numbers appear first in the theology section table of contents.

filename.description: Each topic is stored as a timestamp-named markdown file inside the English subsection folder.

fields.name: subsection
fields.label: Subsection
fields.description: Visible subsection name. You can enter Tamil here, for example: தேவனியல்.

fields.name: subsectionFolder
fields.label: Subsection Folder
fields.description: English folder name for a new subsection, for example: theology-proper, christology, salvation. Leave this empty when creating inside an existing subsection folder.

fields.name: order
fields.label: Order
fields.description: Smaller numbers appear first in the theology section table of contents.

filename.description: Each topic is stored as a timestamp-named markdown file inside subsection and nested group folders.

fields.name: subsection
fields.label: Subsection
fields.description: Visible subsection name. You can enter Tamil here, for example: தேவனியல்.

fields.name: subsectionFolder
fields.label: Subsection Folder
fields.description: English folder name for a new subsection, for example: theology-proper, christology, salvation. Leave this empty when creating inside an existing subsection folder.

fields.name: group
fields.label: Sub-subsection
fields.description: Optional nested group name, for example: Preparation for Christianity. Leave empty if the topic belongs directly under the subsection.

fields.name: groupFolder
fields.label: Sub-subsection Folder
fields.description: English folder name for the nested group, for example: preparation-for-christianity.

fields.name: order
fields.label: Order
fields.description: Smaller numbers appear first in the theology section table of contents.

filename.description: Each book introduction is stored as one markdown file using the book slug.

fields.name: bookFolder
fields.label: Book Folder
fields.description: English folder name for the book, for example: the-mortification-of-sin.

fields.name: credits
fields.label: Credits
fields.description: Source, translator, reviewer, and original-link note shown on the front of the book page. Markdown links are supported.

filename.description: Each chapter is stored as a timestamp-named markdown file inside the book and section folders.

fields.name: bookFolder
fields.label: Book Folder
fields.description: Book folder slug, for example: the-mortification-of-sin.

fields.name: section
fields.label: Section
fields.description: Optional visible section name inside the book.

fields.name: sectionFolder
fields.label: Section Folder
fields.description: English folder name for the section, for example: the-nature-of-mortification.

fields.name: order
fields.label: Order
fields.description: Smaller numbers appear first in the theology section table of contents.
